summary: Hailed as one of the Dead's top‑five shows, with no recorded complaints about sound quality suggesting a solid (likely soundboard) source.
review: Both reviewers describe the performance as great, even calling it potentially one of the band’s best ever. No specific comments are made about the audio fidelity, implying the recording is at least listenable. Overall the show is praised while technical details remain unaddressed.

ai_rating.rationale: Two positive reviews (average 4.5★) highlight an outstanding performance; lack of recording criticism suggests decent audio, yielding a high overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviews do not mention any sound issues or mixing details.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers note the performance was great but give no specifics on set pacing or transitions.
